label: Befolkning 250 m centroid
message: Population proxy: 250 m occupied grid-cell polygon derived from centroids and dissolved. Existing distance table is centroid-based until the polygon-distance table is rebuilt.

label: Mellanvägar
message: Trondelag N500 roads where vegkategor is F. Mirrors Bornholm roads_medium.

label: Stora vägar
message: Trondelag N500 roads where vegkategor is E or R. Mirrors Bornholm roads_large.

label: Naturvernområden
message: Trondelag NEA Naturvern clipped/dissolved as first protected-nature controller; land-use classes stay out until the planned land-use controller.

label: Kulturmiljoer och kulturminnen
message: Norwegian RA cultural heritage environments. Mirrors Bornholm cultural_preservation as a culture hard-exclusion source.

label: Vardefulla kulturlandskap
message: Norwegian NEA cultural landscapes. Mirrors Bornholm valuable_cultural_environment as a culture hard-exclusion source.

label: Reindrift - arstidsbete sammanlagt
message: Landbruksdirektoratet seasonal grazing polygons, merged NW source. Trondelag-specific reindeer husbandry controller; no Bornholm equivalent exists.

label: Reindrift - flyttleier
message: Landbruksdirektoratet migration-route polygons. Treated as broad corridors, not center lines.
